title: brochoneura vouri
side_effects: Brochoneura vouri can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and vomiting, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds like saponins and glycosides. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to abdominal pain, fatigue, and even respiratory distress. Improper use of the plant may also cause allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, particularly in individuals with pre-existing allergies. Furthermore, using brochoneura vouri for medicinal purposes without proper guidance and knowledge can exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease.
